CONTENT: 1️⃣ Bills & Utilities
Review all direct debits and standing orders
Check broadband contract — renegotiate if out of term
Check energy tariff — switch if better rate available
Check mobile phone contract — negotiate or switch
Review streaming subscriptions — cancel unused ones
Check council tax band — appeal if potentially incorrect
2️⃣ Insurance Renewals
Renew or switch home insurance
Renew or switch contents insurance
Renew or switch car insurance — compare before accepting renewal
Renew or switch life insurance if applicable
Review excess amounts and coverage on all policies
Store updated insurance documents in a safe location
3️⃣ Vehicle & MOT
Book MOT before expiry date
Check tyre tread depth and pressure
Check oil
Renew vehicle tax (road tax)
Check service schedule — book if due
Check windscreen for chips — repair before MOT if needed
4️⃣ Property & Home Maintenance
Test smoke and carbon monoxide alarms
Book annual boiler service
Check boiler pressure and bleed radiators if needed
Inspect guttering and downpipes for blockages
Check roof tiles and flashings for damage
Service lawnmower and garden tools (seasonal)
5️⃣ Finance & Records
Review household budget vs actuals
File receipts for any home improvement work
Check that all warranties are registered and stored
Shred outdated documents (older than 7 years)
Back up important household documents digitally
